paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.12 as of 2026-07-20, representing a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close. Over a window of 20 sessions, the price change is -31.77 percent. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Fermi Inc. recently announced its second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which will be hosted on August 13, 2026, as reported by FinanzNachrichten.de. This announcement was made on 2026-07-20.

There have been various SEC filings by Fermi Inc., including a total of 25 filings in the feed, with 1 Form 4 filing and 18 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include a SCHEDULE 13G filing on 2026-07-20, and 8-K filings on 2026-07-15, 2026-07-13, and 2026-07-09, which disclose the issuance of convertible senior notes, the resignation of a director, and the commencement of an offering for the sale of convertible senior notes, respectively.
